name: @tootallnate/ff8-model
description: Pure-JS parser for Final Fantasy VIII's field-character model formats: the `chara.one` outer container that ships in every field map plus the embedded / standalone `.mch` model bodies (PSX-style binary skeleton + vertex/face geometry + delta-packed animation). Includes a small PSX TIM texture decoder for the embedded palette/image blocks. Operates on raw `Uint8Array` input; no I/O.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
